one_line_ask: Take Lunara Silver's one raw vertical pendant-showcase clip, raw founder voiceover, product hero still, and flat wordmark PNG, and repurpose them into a platform pack: 9:16 / 1:1 / 16:9 reframes of the clip (same runtime), an AI sizzle cutdown for the Meta ad, a cleaned founder VO, a caption/scheduling sheet, and a graded end-card still with a vectorized wordmark.
brief:
Lunara Silver is a growing D2C brand of handcrafted sterling-silver jewellery. This week's Reel delegation is our new "Moonlit Pendant" launch, and we need the raw footage repurposed into everything our channels eat. I'm uploading four assets: (1) product_reel_moonlit_raw.mp4 — a ~40-second vertical hand-held product-showcase clip of the pendant being lifted, turned in the light, and worn on the neck, with native room audio; (2) founder_vo_raw.wav — a phone-recorded voiceover from our founder Priya Nair ("Every Lunara piece is poured, not printed…") with room hiss and some AC hum; (3) pendant_hero_raw.jpg — a product hero still shot slightly tilted and cool/flat that we want for the closing end-card frame and the ad thumbnail; (4) lunara_wordmark_flat.png — our flat wordmark logo we want razor-sharp on the end card and reusable on future covers.

What I need back:
- The product clip REPURPOSED into three platform formats at the SAME runtime (reframe only, do not trim the story): a 9:16 (1080x1920) version for Instagram Reels & TikTok, a 1:1 (1080x1080) version for the feed, and the original 16:9 (1920x1080) master for YouTube / website.
- ONE fast-paced AI sizzle/highlight cutdown
